billing.title: Billing
billing.upgradeSubtitle: Scale your restaurant with more features

limits.tablesReached: Table limit reached ({{cap}}). Upgrade to add more.
limits.roomsReached: Room limit reached ({{cap}}). Upgrade to add more.
limits.staffReached: Staff limit reached ({{cap}}). Upgrade to add more.
limits.locationsReached: Location limit reached ({{cap}}). Upgrade to add more.
limits.bookingsReachedCustomer: This restaurant has reached its booking capacity for this month. Please try again next month.

sms.overageActive: Overage active: {{extra}} SMS above quota billed at €0.07/SMS.
sms.notIncluded: SMS notifications are not included in the Free plan.

signup.trialBanner: Start with a {{days}}-day free trial — no credit card required.

lifecycle.writeBlockedToast: Your account is suspended. This action is not available.
lifecycle.suspendedBanner: Your account is suspended. Some features are read-only until payment is restored.
lifecycle.suspendedTooltip: Your account is suspended. Restore payment to use this feature.
lifecycle.cancelledBody: Your data will be retained until {{date}} ({{daysRemaining}} days remaining). After that it will be permanently deleted.
lifecycle.cancelledCustomerBanner: This restaurant has cancelled its subscription.
lifecycle.reactivatedToast: Payment received — your account is active again.
lifecycle.pastDueBanner: Your last payment failed. Update your card to keep your account active.

tenant.suspendConfirmBody: This will block all write operations for the tenant.
tenant.cancelConfirmBody: The tenant's data will be retained for the grace period, then permanently deleted.
tenant.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes all tenant data. This action cannot be undone.
tenant.deleteTypeSlugLabel: Type the tenant slug to confirm

impersonate.confirmBody: You are about to access {{tenant}} as a tenant staff member. This action is logged. The session expires in 15 minutes.
impersonate.callbackError: Impersonation failed. The link may have expired.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Use API keys to integrate TableSched with your booking widget, POS, or internal tooling.
apiKeys.rateLimitNote: Rate limit: 100 requests/hour, 1,000 requests/day per key. Max 5 active keys.
apiKeys.maxReached: You have reached the maximum of 5 active keys.
apiKeys.revokeConfirmBody: Revoke "{{name}}"? Requests using this key will fail immediately. This cannot be undone.
apiKeys.rateLimitedToast: API key rate limit reached. Please wait before retrying.
apiKeys.upsellBody: Programmatic API keys, monthly usage tracking, 100 req/hr · 1,000 req/day per key.
